meanings.definition: someone who claims to discover hidden knowledge with the aid of supernatural powers

examples: everything is black or white...satanic or godly

meanings.definition: being or having the nature of a god; -J.G.Frazier; ; ; -J.G.Saxe
examples: the custom of killing the divine king upon any serious failure of his...powers
'Tis wise to learn; 'tis God-like to create

meanings.definition: devoted to or in the service or worship of a deity
appropriate to or befitting a god; ; ; -R.H.Roveref
examples: man must play God for he has acquired certain godlike powers

meanings.definition: being of such surpassing excellence as to suggest inspiration by the gods
